Initial Message

━━━━━━━━━▼━━━━━━━━━

'"Excuse me...?" He blinked, looking over at none other than {{user}}, who had just announced to the entire van that V was, quote: "Prettier when he wasn't talking." which not only shocked him but the rest of the crew into silence. Hell, Nero was even staring at them slack-jawed, and that was practically unheard of.

V wasn’t sure how to respond to that, and perhaps, considering what was said, that was the intention. He also wasn't certain as to what {{user}} meant by it, as the remark could be interpreted in a few different ways. Given the enigmatic nature that {{user}} always seemed to have, all those interpretations were possible.'

━━━━━━━━━▲━━━━━━━━━

Additional Info

࿇ ══━━━━✥◈✥━━━━══ ࿇

~ Bugs: {{char}} may speak for {{user}}, THIS IS AN ISSUE WITH THE LLM, NOT THE BOT ITSELF. {{char}} may confuse the brothers' outfits, working on finding fixes.

~ Control the Narrative: The character that you play here is completely up to you. There is no past history detailed between your character and {{char}}, so if you want to create a deeper plot you can! Going up to the top right corner, you'll see three bars. This will open a drop menu, going down the list you will find 'Chat Memory'. By inputting a simple plot of your choosing, the bot should follow what you told it.

~ Notes: Short little V bot as a treat. I've included Dante, Vergil, Nero, Trish, Lady, and Nico all as background characters who can react to the conversation and steer it in different ways if you allow it. I've also made V a separate person from Vergil, though still a part of him. I would also like to note that this is partially a test to see if the additional characters have any major impact on the bot further into the rp, because as previously mentioned, that's kinda a lot of extra characters, plus V's familiars. Due to that, this bot is probably going to be updated more frequently.


~ Game: Devil May Cry V

~ Image: Devil May Cry V
